# THA3 black box — ONNX Runtime + DirectML (no local PyTorch .pt weights).
# Requires requirements-shell.txt (MediaPipe pose → 45-float THA3 vector).
#
# DO NOT add the `onnx` pip package — it requires protobuf>=4 and breaks mediapipe.
# tha3_engine.py stubs sys.modules["onnx"] before loading ezvtuber tha3_ort.

-r requirements-shell.txt
onnxruntime-directml==1.23.0
